title: AstroTerra
description: Autonomous lunar rover navigation and hazard detection system utilizing deep learning to map craters via Chandrayaan-2 OHRC imagery. Integrates the A* algorithm for real-time, obstacle-free path planning.

title: Accident Crash Detection Emergency System
description: IoT and AI-powered vehicle black box combining multi-sensor telemetry with computer vision for collision analysis. Automatically identifies surrounding vehicles and dispatches instant emergency alerts via SMTP.

title: Brain Wizard
description: AI-driven mental health assistant integrating natural language processing and Generative AI for real-time speech and text support. Employs transformer models for sentiment analysis and disorder detection.

title: Smart Cleaning Robot for High-Rise Buildings
description: Wire-powered autonomous cleaning robot featuring an aerodynamic aluminum chassis designed in Autodesk Fusion 360. Eliminates battery e-waste while ensuring continuous, high-efficiency vertical surface maintenance.

title: The Murphy System
description: Multi-disease diagnosis ecosystem combining ensemble machine learning, CNNs, and NLP. Integrates automated screening for brain tumors and breast cancer alongside symptom-based predictive diagnostics.
